mapper.select: select b.board_id as boardId, b.title, b.created_at as createdAt, b.view_count as viewCount, b.content, m.nickname as nickName from board b inner join member m on b.member_id = m.member_id where b.board_id = #{boardId}

select r.res_id as resId, r.check_in as checkIn, r.check_out as checkOut, r.status, r.created_at as createdAt, m.nickname as nickName from reservation r inner join member m on r.member_id = m.member_id where r.member_id = #{memberId} order by r.res_id desc
